violations.description: VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood over range noted not clean. Dripping grease over front edge of hood too. Additionally it was noted there are some small gaps between hood filters.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded over the dish machine area.
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Frying pans noted stored on booster heater below dish machine. This is not a clean sanitizable location.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the walk-in freezer under shelving noted in need of cleaning. Broken floor tiles noted near oven in back kitchen. Ceiling supports between ceiling tiles noted rusty and no longer smooth and easily cleanable/sanitizable surface.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): White cutting boards in kitchen noted in need of resurfacing repair or replacement. Noted with permanent staining and grooves.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors/walls around mop sink under and around in place equipment and ceiing around vents noted in need of cleaning. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen noted in need of grout repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exterior of reach-in coolers/freezers and interiors of reachin coolers/freezers noted in need of cleaning.
